steps.t: Cúcheron is outside the Haunted Inn, in Audaghaim. You have investigated the ruins of Agistath for Cúcheron and should tell him what you found.
Gravestones can be found throughout Audaghaim. Cúcheron has asked you to leave the broken wooden toy at one of the gravestones located in Audaghaim.
Cúcheron is outside the Haunted Inn, in Audaghaim. You have done as Cúcheron asked and left the broken wooden toy at one of the gravestones in Audagha…
